# frozen_string_literal: true

module Api
  module Org
    module V3
      # v3 api endpoints for accounts
      class AccountsController < BaseController
        prepend_before_action :set_draft_account, only: %i[create]
        skip_before_action :set_account, only: %i[create]

        def show
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          serialize_obj(@account, view: :extended)
        end

        def create
          authorize %i[api org v3 account]

          if @account.update(account_params)
            current_user.make_access!(@account, :superadmin)

            serialize_obj(@account, status: :created, view: :extended)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@account)
          end
        end

        def update
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          if signature_501c4?
            account_params.merge!(
              signed_at_501c4: Time.zone.now,
              signed_by_501c4: current_user
            )
          end
          account_params.merge!(signatory: current_user) if signature?

          if @account.update(account_params)
            serialize_obj(@account, view: :extended)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@account)
          end
        end

        def pause
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          @account.paused!

          head :no_content
        end

        def unpause
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          return head :forbidden unless @account.paused?

          @account.active!
          if @account.paypal_merchant.blank?
            Paypal::OnboardAccountWorker.perform_async(@account.id, current_user.uid)
          end

          head :no_content
        end

        def submit
          authorize [:api, :org, :v3, @account]

          if @account.update(status: :pending)
            serialize_obj(@account, view: :extended)
          else
            serialize_errors_for(@account)
          end
        end

      private

        def set_account
          @account = current_account_scope.not_deleted.find_by!(uid: params[:id])
        end

        def set_draft_account
          if (signup_token = params[:signup_token])
            @partner = Account.active.find_by!(uid: signup_token)
          end

          scope = Account.draft.not_deleted.where(user: current_user)
          @account = scope.find_by(name: params[:name]) || scope.new(partner: @partner)
        end

        def signature?
          account_params[:signature].present?
        end

        def signature_501c4?
          account_params[:signature501c4].present?
        end

        def account_params
          @account_params ||= if @account&.active?
                                active_account_params
                              else
                                draft_account_params
                              end
        end

        def active_account_params
          params.require(params_wrapper).permit(
            *ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS.map(&:underscore)
          )
        end

        def draft_account_params
          params.require(params_wrapper).permit(
            *ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS.map(&:underscore),
            *DRAFT_PERMITTED_PARAMS.map(&:underscore)
          )
        end

        # possibly add: avatar, previousVendor, religious, removeAvatar, type
        ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS = %w[
          disclaimer
          displayName
          district
          email
          expectedVolume
          facebook
          favIconId
          imageId
          instagram
          minimumDonationAmount
          nextElectionDate
          phone
          publicAddressId
          slug
          timeZone
          twitter
          url
        ].freeze

        # possibly add: autoDisbursementFrequency, partnerId
        DRAFT_PERMITTED_PARAMS = %w[
          category
          description
          directoryName
          displayName
          electionDate
          entityType
          establishedDate
          fecCommitteeId
          name
          politicalParty
          purpose
          religious
          signature
          signature501c4
          softDescriptor
          subCategory
          subCategoryType
          subPurpose
          taxid
          title501c4
        ].freeze

        wrap_parameters params_wrapper, include: ACTIVE_PERMITTED_PARAMS + DRAFT_PERMITTED_PARAMS
      end
    end
  end
end

payload.message:
Committed `Document account directory name + FEC id fields` to align the controller, docs, and Swagger spec.

- `app/controllers/api/org/v3/accounts_controller.rb:122` removes `directoryName`/`fecCommitteeId` from the active whitelist so only drafts can change them.
- `public/api-docs/org_v3.json:2360` documents the new `directoryName` and `fecCommitteeId` properties and fixes the signature ordering.
- `spec/integration/api/org/v3/accounts_spec.rb:18` mirrors the schema updates in the integration spec definitions.
- `public/api-docs/public_v3.json:983` adds the documented `400 bad_request` response for requesting donation tokens.

Next: `git push` when you’re ready.

content.text:
Committed `Document account directory name + FEC id fields` to align the controller, docs, and Swagger spec.

- `app/controllers/api/org/v3/accounts_controller.rb:122` removes `directoryName`/`fecCommitteeId` from the active whitelist so only drafts can change them.
- `public/api-docs/org_v3.json:2360` documents the new `directoryName` and `fecCommitteeId` properties and fixes the signature ordering.
- `spec/integration/api/org/v3/accounts_spec.rb:18` mirrors the schema updates in the integration spec definitions.
- `public/api-docs/public_v3.json:983` adds the documented `400 bad_request` response for requesting donation tokens.

Next: `git push` when you’re ready.
